title: Web app (Vite) over Tauri/Electron
rationale: Spec recommended Tauri (needs Rust) or Electron (heavy). A local-only file-reading tool needs none of it: File API + drag-drop to load, DOMParser to parse, Blob downloads + window.print() for export/PDF - all offline, no backend. Shipped as a Vite + React + TS + Tailwind v4 static bundle. Tauri/Electron is a thin wrapper around the same dist/ if a native window is ever wanted.
